Contact

I read every message and respond when I can. For media, speaking, research, or case-related inquiries, use this form to request a conversation without including confidential or identifying case details.

Send a message

Please note: I cannot provide emergency assistance, legal advice, or case management through this form. If you are in immediate danger, call 911. For urgent matters related to extortion, sextortion, or coercive threats, see stop-extortion.ca for guidance and support resources.

Protect your privacy. This form is processed by Formspree, an external service. Submissions may be stored in its form inbox and delivered by email. Do not include names of victims or accused persons, addresses, evidence, allegations, health information, financial details, or anything else confidential or identifying. For a case-related inquiry, provide only your contact information and a general request to speak.

Submitting the form means you understand this limited use. Review Formspree's privacy policy before sending.

Other ways to reach me

For media inquiries, research collaboration, or speaking requests, the contact form is the best route. I also check messages on Telegram periodically.

  • Telegram: @Impunity08
SERIAL CRIMINOLOGIST

Public criminology. Evidence over anecdote. Understanding before response.
